steps.title: Name a neutrino researcher
steps.content: The goal asks for an example of a particle physicist whose work focuses on neutrinos. The notes supply both required pieces: Luciano Moretti is a particle physicist and is known for solar and geoneutrino research.

steps.title: Drop general neutrino claims
steps.content: A describes neutrinos without naming a physicist, B discusses research generally, and D describes a field of work without giving the named example. The sentence must identify Moretti and his focus. The answer is C.
